$note: TIER 2 codegen-ready spec — produced by the geo data pipeline from contracts/geo/src-data/*.spec.json (Tier 1). Matches the canonical entity record shape; consumed directly by codegen (.NET SourceGen + TS emitter — Tier 3) to produce concrete entity types. Do NOT hand-edit — re-run `pnpm geo:refresh` to regenerate. IsSelectable derived from contracts/messages/{tag}.json file presence (currently 10 selectable). FirstDayOfWeek denormalized from Country[locale.country]; matches via parity test.
